values.description: Base URL for the TariffShield API. Change to your Render preview URL or production URL as needed.
Email address of a surety_admin account. Used for admin-only endpoints (accrue-yield, clawback).
Password for the surety_admin account. Never commit real credentials.
Email address of an importer account. Used by the collection pre-request script for auto-authentication.
Password for the importer account. Used by the collection pre-request script for auto-authentication. Never commit real credentials.
UUID of the registered importer record. Populate this after calling POST /importers by copying the returned `importer.id`.
Soroban contract ID for the deployed TariffShield contract. Find this in STELLAR_CONTRACT_ID in your .env file or Render environment variables.
